title: stachys mollissima
intro: Stachys mollissima, also known as the Chinese hedging hedgemint or woolly betony, is a perennial plant native to China and Mongolia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Stachys mollissima include its potential to alleviate headaches, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herb in herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, Stachys mollissima is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
